creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #3)
> What do you mean by this change of state to Timeout/Feedback Timeout? This
> is normally used the other way around, so I can't see what outcome you
> expect here.

AFAIK, submitter or maintainer must answer to corresponding PR in a two weeks (correct me if there were any changes). I didn't receive any answer for more than six months, so I think that maintainer timeout was hit.
